# Vendored dependencies

`xlsx-0.20.3.tgz` is the SheetJS Community Edition package from:

`https://cdn.sheetjs.com/xlsx-0.20.3/xlsx-0.20.3.tgz`

SHA-256: `8DC73FC3B00203E72D176E85B50938627C7B086E607C682E8D3C22C02BB99FE8`

The tarball is committed so production builds do not depend on SheetJS CDN availability.
